summary: Frontend-only verification of Bright Vision Infotech UI redesign and updated social media links. All 9 requested test items passed on desktop and mobile.
critical_code_review_comments: HeroSection.jsx has hardcoded 95% success rate in inline stats block (line 171) that does not align with the stats bar values (25+, 5000+, 1000+, 10-20). Consider aligning or documenting the two distinct stat groupings.
Hero 3D book image uses an external customer-assets URL. If this asset is moved/deleted the hero will break. Consider hosting image locally in /public.
ContactSection submit does not surface backend error details to end user beyond a generic toast; fine for UX but worth logging server-side.
Footer & ContactSection duplicate socialLinks arrays — candidate for a shared constant/util.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only test executed at https://bvi-institute.preview.emergentagent.com. Verified: (1) hero section with 3D book image loads correctly (naturalWidth>0), (2) gradient title 'Where Futures Begin' renders, (3) stats bar shows 25+/5000+/1000+/10-20, (4) Navbar 'Admission Open' CTA scrolls to contact section, (5) WhatsApp link -> https://wa.me/919811810364?text=..., (6) Instagram link -> https://www.instagram.com/brightvisioninfotech?igsh=..., (7) LinkedIn link -> https://in.linkedin.com/company/brightvisioninfotech, (8) Footer social URLs updated and working, (9) Contact form POST succeeded (success view + sonner toast displayed — backend /api/contact is functional, note Resend email still MOCKED per problem statement), (10) Mobile (390x844) responsive menu opens via hamburger and shows Admission Open CTA. No issues found.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs identified during this iteration.
